description: User scrolls down in the 'Filter Opportunities' modal, moving from the 'Task Type' section to the 'Duration' section.
frame_description: The filter modal content shifts upwards, hiding 'Task Type' options and revealing 'Duration' options.

description: User scrolls further down in the 'Filter Opportunities' modal to reveal the 'Pay Rate' section.
frame_description: The filter modal content shifts upwards, revealing the 'Pay Rate' slider below the 'Duration' section.
